quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: Engineered for excellence. Our optical cables meet rigorous international standards for performance and durability.

global.title: Global Standards
global.description: Certified compliance with ISO and IEC specifications ensures seamless integration into worldwide networks.

reliable.title: Reliable Connectivity
reliable.description: Designed to withstand harsh environments, delivering uninterrupted signal transmission 24/7.

products.title: Our <1>Products</1>
products.subtitle: Explore our range of high-performance optical fiber cables designed for global connectivity.

selfSupporting.title: Self-Supporting Cable
selfSupporting.description: Optical self-supporting cable for suspension on supports of communication lines, power transmission lines, and railways.

armoredDuct.title: Armored Duct Cable
armoredDuct.description: Distributor cable for ducts (plastic pipes) and suspension on supports of communication lines.
specs: Armor - layer of galvanized steel wire
Outer shell - light-stabilized resistant to UV

flatDrop.title: Flat Drop Cable
flatDrop.description: Distribution cable in a flat design, intended for suspension on communication towers and urban transport.

figure8.title: Figure-8 Aerial Cable
figure8.description: Trunk optical cable with a supporting power element (steel cable) for suspension on support lines.

armoredSoil.title: Buried Armored Cable
armoredSoil.description: Trunk optical cable for direct burial in soil of all categories, overpasses, and bridges.
specs: Armor - layer of galvanized steel wire

about.title: About <1>Döwletli</1>
about.label: Our Story
about.description: Modern production complex in Mary, Turkmenistan. We produce high-quality optical cables for global markets.
about.history: As the country's sole producer of optical fiber cables, we are driving the national IT market forward. Our expertise extends beyond connectivity to the manufacturing of high-quality computer chassis.
about.expansion: Actively expanding our portfolio, we are launching advanced network hardware production to meet the demands of a digital future.
about.mission: To provide reliable and high-speed connectivity solutions to the world.
